---
title: "Reflection"
---

## What I Learned

Throughout this module, I developed a range of technical and analytical skills 
that I had not previously worked with in a structured way.

## Git and Version Control

Learning to use Git and GitHub was one of the most valuable skills I acquired. 
I now understand how to track changes, write meaningful commit messages, and 
manage a project repository professionally.

## Quarto and Web Development

Building this ePortfolio with Quarto taught me how websites are structured 
and how to customise them using HTML, CSS and YAML configuration.

## Python and Machine Learning

Working with Python for the Diabetes Prediction project deepened my understanding 
of machine learning concepts such as Decision Trees, Random Forest, recall and 
model evaluation.

## Looking Ahead

These skills are directly applicable to my career goals in finance, strategy 
and data analytics, where data-driven decision making is increasingly important.
